name: VM/serverless with cleartext SSH private keys that can be used to access other resources
description: A compute resource contains SSH private keys that can be used to access other resources
conditions: secrets ANY (type == 'ssh_private_key' AND cleartext == true AND can_access_other_resources == true)
remediation: Remove SSH private keys from the resource. Use SSH certificate-based authentication or IAM-based access. Rotate compromised keys.
